name: Drive-by Compromise via Browser Child Process
description: Detects browser processes spawning suspicious child processes indicative of drive-by exploitation
query:
// Detect browsers spawning non-browser child processes
// Indicates possible drive-by download exploitation
events from edr_process
where parent_exe matches "(?i)(chrome|firefox|msedge|iexplore|safari|opera|brave)\.exe"
  and exe_path matches "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell|wscript|cscript|mshta|rundll32|regsvr32|certutil)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
